scripts.build: bun run build:frontend && bun run build:worker
scripts.db:migrate: cd worker && wrangler d1 execute interactive-rails-db --file=src/db/schema.sql --local
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd worker && wrangler d1 execute interactive-rails-db --file=src/db/schema.sql
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bun run deploy:worker && bun run deploy:frontend
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.typecheck:frontend: cd frontend && bun run astro check
